name: teamwork-skill
description: Claude Code adapter skills for evidence-first planning, execution, review, Task subagent routing, and durable goal convergence.

interface.shortDescription: Use Teamwork's Codex-first protocol as a Claude Code Task-subagent adapter.
interface.longDescription: A Claude Code adapter entrypoint plus dedicated stage skills for project instruction initialization, evidence gathering, native Teamwork index/current memory, goal proposal, durable artifact memory, scoped execution, Task subagent routing, fresh review, package updates, and autonomous goal convergence on top of Claude Code native capabilities.
defaultPrompt: Design a goal with evidence, scope, retry policy, artifacts, and Task subagent routing.
Initialize or slim project AGENTS/CLAUDE rules while preserving local evidence boundaries.
Apply Teamwork's Codex-first collaboration protocol to Claude Code evidence, planning, execution, and review tracks.
Use Task subagents for independent investigation, scoped Worker execution, or fresh-context review.
Map completion claims and Memory Delta status to direct evidence before accepting the result.
Update Teamwork version metadata and validate the installed skill surface.
